climate fellowship

Climate Change: Learning for Action

12-week intensive program covering climate science, impacts, and solutions, to get you working on climate.

⏰ Applications close: April 23

Apply now

Meet changemaking alumni

Meet alumni who leveraged their skills, passion, and Terra.do training to secure new positions in climate.

Attend open houses

Ask alumni about their climate career journeys and learn how best to leverage the climate fellowship at live, online Q&A events.

Understand critical areas of the climate landscape

Explore actionable solutions in several areas of climate through cohort-based courses.
